name: Modern Trio
description:
My attempt at consistently uploading a character is so far successful so here's another. i hope you enjoy this one, but considering the love "Sad Kat" got i don't think i need to worry.

I took some inspiration for the scenario from a Modern day Natani and Keith bot that @XXSaschaZocktXX did. i plan on going back sometime in the near future to add another intro probably one more focused at the actual image for the bot, so the people who pick their chats based off of image aren't disappointed.

(and no i didnt forget about the valentines bot)

\\\\SHOUT-OUTS/////

if you like my bots you love:

> @Silverlock_Studies
> @XXSaschaZocktXX
> @jacob1234567890
> @SomeGuyInStrangeWorld
> @normal motherfucker
